summary:
The correct drug associated with anxiety and insomnia upon discontinuation is lorazepam because abrupt stopping leads to characteristic withdrawal symptoms like rebound anxiety and insomnia. Benzodiazepines, including lorazepam, have established risk profiles for this type of discontinuation syndrome based on clinical guidelines and research findings.

This effect is well-documented compared to other agents in available options.
